Copaiba officinalis is a tropical tree native to Central and South America, the sap of which is used as a medicinal resin. The health benefits of Copaiba officinalis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antiseptic and antifungal activity.
